prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `b5bb5719`.
codex_response:
Implemented `b5bb5719` as a top-row seed propagation task: take the interval from the first to last non-`7` cell, then on each lower row shift the previous active segment one cell down-right, swap `2 <-> 5`, and leave `7` unchanged until the interval collapses. The package is wired in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b5bb5719/__init__.py#L1), the verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b5bb5719/verifier.py#L4), and the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b5bb5719/generator.py#L16).

The summary hint was discarded and corrected in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b5bb5719/notes.md#L1): `arc2_opus46_summary.json` only fits the dense full-row cases and misses the official gapped seed rows. The generator matches the task family by explicitly mixing dense full-span seeds with alternating gapped seeds, which are the two visible modes in the training set. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `8/8`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b5bb5719/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b5bb5719/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b5bb5719/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b5bb5719/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b5bb5719/previews/preview_03.png). I also rendered `preview_01.png` in-terminal and it looked on-family.
